body_txt: In many works featuring royalty, the king (or queen) has the power to heal the sick, whether as part of their duties to their people or as confirmation of their divine right to rule , based on the supposed ability of French kings to do this in Real Life . A common form of this is Healing Hands . May overlap with Priest King . This can also overlap with Combat Medic when you have a Warrior Prince , Pretty Princess Powerhouse , etc. A Sub-Trope of Royals Who Actually Do Something and Royalty Superpower . May involve Holy Healing Magic if the ruler's power has a divine source. Compare Benevolent Mage Ruler and Fisher King , which have something of the effect on a grand scale.
